title: Notice on Measures Regarding Arcane Catalyst
original_title: Notice on Measures Regarding Arcane Catalyst
author: msnadmin
summary: MapleStory N blocked an Arcane Catalyst interaction that allowed symbols to be merged rather than transferred. Affected characters are being adjusted to retain the larger valid symbol amount, with eligible NESO refunds and a 50 Arcane Symbol Selector compensation package available through July 30.

sections.title: Usage restriction
items: Characters holding Lachelein Coins or Arcana Coins can no longer use Unstable Arcane Symbols.
The restriction closes a path that could combine symbols from different characters instead of performing the intended transfer.

sections.title: Affected-character processing
items: The larger of the existing symbol amount and transferred unstable-symbol amount is retained; the other amount is deducted or returned according to its source.
Eligible Express Pass and Arcane Catalyst NESO spending is refunded based on the adjustment applied.
Processed symbols are distributed through Maple Storage for the specific character, their levels reset, and prior symbol level-up NESO is refunded.

sections.title: Compensation
items: Accounts created before the maintenance can claim up to 50 Arcane Symbol Selectors once per account through the Maple Administrator.
Claims require a level 200 or higher character and remain available through July 30 at 23:59 UTC.
Arcane Symbol: Esfera is excluded from the selector.
